initial_findings_summary: Gateway rejection did not trigger launch cleanup
close_self could not restore leaderSessionKey from HTTP token actor
env/manual modes created secret-bearing config files
final_message: No findings. Prior findings were resolved by scope gates, gateway failure cleanup, registry leader resolution, canonical close_self compatibility, generated-file-only 0600 config files, and token store revocation wiring. Residual note: TOKEN_REVOKED is not yet centralized in MCP_DENIAL_CODES; not a blocking T-PH005-02 defect.
